content: Create benchmark for standard vs optimized shader performance

Create progress store and types

Set default threshold to midpoint of data range
Replace emoji icons with VSCode SVG icons
Improve visual contrast and borders
Enhance progress bars with indeterminate state
Move test buttons to drawer footer
Implement task grouping by status
Improve task card layout hierarchy
Add ARIA labels for accessibility
